title: Pan-Fried Potato Dumplings with Citrus
description: A simple yet flavorful dish, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner. Crunchy potato dumplings are topped with a zesty citrus glaze.
instructions: In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the grated potatoes and cook until they start to brown, stirring occasionally.
Add the dumplings to the pan and cook until they are golden brown on all sides.
In a small bowl, mix together the citrus zest and crushed crispy fried shallots.
Sprinkle the citrus-shallot mixture over the dumplings and potatoes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
